content.full_text:
State of California
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. BOX 807 • SACRAMENTO, 95804 • • • 1100 K STREET BUILDING, SACRAMENTO, 95814

Technical Assistance • • Administration • • Executive/Legal • • Enforcement • • Statements of Economic Interest
(916) 322-5662 322-5660 322-5901 322-6441 322-6444

July 22, 1981


Margaret L. Long
1150 Sereno Drive
Vallejo, California 94589

Dear Ms. Long:

This is in reply to your letter dated July 2, 1981, concerning
campaign reporting for the Solano County Democratic Central
Committee.

Enclosed is a copy of the "1981 Information Manual on Campaign
Provisions of the Political Reform Act." Please read the
explanation on page 4 of the manual to determine if your com-
mittee is required to file a semi-annual campaign statement
covering the period January 1 through June 30. (If the commit-
tee has received or made contributions or made any independent
expenditures in any amount during that time period, it will be
required to file a semi-annual statement.

Regarding contributions received in connection with the fund-
raiser to be held on July 18, the committee will not have to
file a threshold statement because of contributions it receives.
Only if it makes contributions or independent expenditures of
$500 or more will it be required to file the statement due on
September 22. Therefore, if the committee does not make contri-
butions or independent expenditures totaling $500 or more during
the third and fourth threshold periods and if it was not required
to file a semi-annual statement covering the period January 1
through June 30, the first campaign statement required would
cover the period January 1 through December 31, and would be
due no later than January 31, 1982.

Regarding the check for the VIP program, I need some additional
information before a determination can be made as to the proper
method of reporting. Please call me collect at (916)322-5662
at your convenience so we can discuss it.

Sincerely,

Jeanne Pritchard
Political Reform Consultant

FPC

JUL 7 8 38 AH '81

1150 Serrano Drv.
Vallejo, Ca. 94589
July 2, 1981
707

Fair Political Practices Commission
Tech. Assistance & Analysis Div.
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, Ca. 95804

Dear Sir:

I have recently been appointed treasurer of the Solano County
Democratic Central Committee, P.O. Box 742472. Since I was treasurer for
former Senator John Dunlap for several years I have some knowledge
of what is required for reporting. I am aware that changes have been
made in the law so I will appreciate it if you would send me the
appropriate forms and 1981 Information Manual.

In the Democratic paper the schedules reporting dates mentions
"thresholds". So I understand it correctly if a fundraiser our
Committee is holding on July 18 brings in, hopefully, over 2500,
a report is due on September 22.

Also, would you tell me how the check for the VIP program is
reported. Do I list the amount as coming from the State party, or
do I list the individual donors?

I am already on the mailing list of the FPPC but my zip code
has been changed to 94589.

Thank you.

Yours truly,


Margaret L. Long

FPP' TRANSMITTAL OF CORRESPONDENCE

CORRESPONDENT [illegible] [illegible] [illegible]                    DATE
                                                                     REC'D  4/17

DATE  4/2        RE:  _________________________________________________

ADMINISTRATION              CONFLICTS/LEGAL           ENFORCEMENT
___ BOB T.                   ___ BARBARA.             ___ BOB B.
___ LINDA                    ___ DIANE
___ BEV                      ___ STELLA
                             ___ ALICE
EXECUTIVE                    ___ JEANETTE            TA&A
___ TOM H.                   ___ BOB L.              ___ LYNN          ___ JAY
___ TED                                              ___ CARLA         ___ RICH
___ NANCY W.                                         ___ MARYANN       ___ HELEN-L.A.
___ BOB S.                                                             ___ JEANNE
___ JOHN M.


                    Jeane


___ INFORMATION   -REQUEST FOR ADVICE--MUST BE ANSWERED WITHIN 21 DAYS

   [illegible], PLEASE:

   ___ TAKE WHATEVER ACTION YOU CONSIDER APPROPRIATE
   ___ REPLY DIRECT BY         --COPY TO ___________
   ___ PREPARE SUGGESTED REPLY AND RETURN TO _________
   ___ COORDINATE REPLY WITH ________________
